title: Gamka Land Rover Exploration Society loves to explore
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The newly inaugurated Gamka Land Rover Exploration Society was launched on 29 March at Buffelsdrift Game Reserve, just outside Oudtshoorn.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The newly inaugurated Gamka Land Rover Exploration Society was launched on 29 March at Buffelsdrift Game Reserve, just outside Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Participants were treated to a guided self-drive through the reserve along dusty tracks and peaks, meandering through the cheetah area of the Red Stone cliffs section of the reserve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Organisers Peter Hayward and Steve Bosch, set out last year in September to create a club that would offer Land Rover enthusiasts educational and eco-explorative trips throughout the greater Gouritz Cluster region of the Western Cape, a Unesco World Heritage site.","html":"Organisers Peter Hayward and Steve Bosch, set out last year in September to create a club that would offer Land Rover enthusiasts educational and eco-explorative trips throughout the greater Gouritz Cluster region of the Western Cape, a Unesco World Heritage site."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“With so much to explore in this region, including 21 mountain passes exposing incredible geology, botanic, fossil, historic tracks and trails not to mention a marine wonderland second to none, we aim to create enthralling short day trips (with optional overnight stays) into our surrounds and discover first hand what makes this region so unique - and support various environmental projects wherever we can,” said Peter Hayward.","html":"“With so much to explore in this region, including 21 mountain passes exposing incredible geology, botanic, fossil, historic tracks and trails not to mention a marine wonderland second to none, we aim to create enthralling short day trips (with optional overnight stays) into our surrounds and discover first hand what makes this region so unique - and support various environmental projects wherever we can,” said Peter Hayward."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“There are so many Land Rover enthusiasts in this region. In 2019 over 100 Land Rovers arrived in Calitzdorp for a festival,” added Bosch.","html":"“There are so many Land Rover enthusiasts in this region. In 2019 over 100 Land Rovers arrived in Calitzdorp for a festival,” added Bosch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you’re a Land Rover fan looking to explore and make a difference, please contact them on [email protected] or [email protected].","html":"If you’re a Land Rover fan looking to explore and make a difference, please contact them on [email protected] or [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
